case_title: CARREIRA, BELA J. VS PACIFIC UNION REAL ESTATE GROUP, LTD et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-02-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-10-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL. DEFECTIVE SUBSTITUTED SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC UNION.
CERT MAIL TO SCS LAWYERS CORP RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARREIRA, BELA J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLD, RICH MR. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $92.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,092.00, THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT PACIFIC UNION REAL ESTATE GROUP, LTD AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF BELA CARREIRA. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
